title: CSAF converter tests specification (schema)
description: Specifies testcases to test CSAF converters. Developed for CSAF 2.0 to 2.1, but may work for converters between other versions of the standard.

input_csaf_revision.description: The CSAF version of the files specified in each test.input. After the CSAF version number, there MAY be a dash followed by a specification of the variant. This includes pre and post release versions like `2.0-errata01` which includes the first errata and `2.1-cs02`, which is a pre-release version from the committee. It should be official variants. A following plus `+` with a string, giving a sub-variant, is possible.

output_csaf_revision.description: CSAF version of the files, that the converter to be tested is supposed to put out. Same format as `input_csaf_revision`.

requirement_level.description: Requirement level of the test case, expressing in three RFC2119 terms. If not given, default is `MUST`.

asserts.description: List of conditions that must all be met by the output of a converter run to pass the test.

oneOf.description: Did the converter indicate a successful run?
When JSONPath (RFC 9535) expession in `query` is applied to the output file of the converter, the resulting nodes list must be equal to the `expected_result`.
All `substrings_match` must be found in a single error or warning message of the converter run.
